channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Fly Tipping, 25th March
item.description:
I emailed yesterday regarding this and had a reply stating it was resolved but it is not more rubbish has been added to this. Can someone please remove this rubbish as its an eye sore for our business.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Watermint Quay, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Cockmannings Road sign damaged, 25th March
item.description:
Cockmannings Road sign is damaged needs straightening before it gets worse thx

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 50, Chelsfield Road, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Disgusting rubbish overflow, 25th March
item.description:
This bag has been there for DAYS. Get a damn bit already as this is DISGUSTING. Why are Lewisham council so damn lazy?!

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Conington Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bins blocking public road., 25th March
item.description:
Bins being placed in road preventing road users using the space as intended.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Niederwald Road, Perry Vale, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Household waste blocking road, 25th March
item.description:
Household waste and furniture is being dumped weekly. It is now blocking the path of cars. This is also a public health issue as it's unknown what is on or in the items.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Bradstock Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned car, 25th March
item.description:
Abandoned far out from kerb, facing wrong way up one-way street

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Red Lion Lane, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: More rubbish added, 25th March
item.description:
More rubbish has been added - carpet and bin bags. problem is marked as resolved but it is not resolved.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Osbaldeston Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping- been here for months, 25th March
item.description:
Please collect asap

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Mountgrove Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Keep left sign knocked down, 25th March
item.description:
Keep left sign on pedestrian crossing knocked down
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 173, Penhill Road, Blendon, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter picking on Barry Road needed asap on this stretch, 25th March
item.description:
Rubbish all over the street. Needs litter picking asap.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 70, Barry Road, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping in tree outside NISA, 25th March
item.description:
Umbrella flytipped in tree alongside lots of other rubbish like an inhaler. Please clear asap

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bass Mews, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Table, rubble sac, waste bin, bike seat, wood and charcoal, 25th March
item.description:
Fly tipper has dumped every 500 metres down the road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Calmont Road, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Closed road without permit from local authority, 25th March
item.description:
There is a company currently cutting down trees in an unsafe way whilst also blocking off the whole road to vehicles and pedestrians without a permit. This company should be fined as I cannot believe the council allow while Street closures without 3 months of statutory time being allowed.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Grierson Road, Honor Oak, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Black bag of rubbish left again in this location, 25th March
item.description:
This time the person who seems to regularly leave rubbish here has left a council tax bill in the bag, and it seems the bag was opened by foxes. So you can see the name and the address of the person who put the rubbish there. I have a photo of the address

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Graham Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Willow walk tp is sprayed, 25th March
item.description:
A shared use tp is sprayed on willow walk outside 2 zone gr.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 61, Willow Walk, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Old buggy, 25th March
item.description:
Dumped on the pavement
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 71, Talfourd Road, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: URGENT main bin fallen into the road, 25th March
item.description:
An accident waiting to happen and its full so no one can move it 10 buller close Peckham SE156UJ

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 15, Buller Close, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bikes causing obstruction in road and residents parking bay please remove, 25th March
item.description:
Bikes causing obstruction in road and residents parking bay please remove

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Meadowbank, Chalk Farm, Greater London

item.title: Bikes causing obstruction in road and residents parking bay please remove, 25th March
item.description:
Bikes causing obstruction in road and residents parking bay please remove

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Meadowbank, Chalk Farm, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Biohazard Flytip on Copers Cope road, 25th March
item.description:
Yet again some scumbag has fly tipped the waste from their favourite chicken shop with cooked cooked and raw meat and packaging strewn all over both sides of the grass verge on Copers Cope Road outside Crystal Palace football club Academy indoor pitch

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Worsley Bridge Road, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
